VUB–Leeds Algebra School (2026)

8–12 June 2026 • Brussels, Belgium

Organised within the topYB International Joint Research Group (IJRG).

TopYB | Overview | Poster session | Programme | Schedule | Location & Travel | Organisers

Draft timetable

Draft schedule: Each mini-course is planned to consist of four hours of lectures.

Draft timetable (8–12 June 2026)

Day Morning Afternoon
Mon 8 Jun 09:00–09:30 Registration and opening
09:30–10:30 Pavel Etingof
10:30–11:00 Coffee break
11:00–12:00 Markus Szymik 		12:00–14:00 Lunch
14:30–15:30 Pavel Etingof
15:30–16:00 Coffee break
16:00–17:00 Markus Szymik
Tue 9 Jun 09:30–10:30 Pavel Etingof
10:30–11:30 Coffee break and institutional greetings
11:30–12:30 Christoph Schweigert 		12:30-14:00 Lunch
14:00–15:00 Pavel Etingof
15:00-15:30 break
15:30–16:30 Christoph Schweigert
17:00–18:30 Free beer tasting, Building G, room G.6.60.
Wed 10 Jun 09:30–10:30 Karin Baur
10:30–11:00 Coffee break
11:00–12:00 Markus Szymik 		12:00–14:00 Lunch
14:30–15:30 Poster session
15:30–16:00 Coffee break
16:00–17:00 Poster session
Thu 11 Jun 09:30–10:30 Christoph Schweigert
10:30–11:00 Coffee break
11:00–12:00 Karin Baur 		12:00–14:00 Lunch
14:30–15:30 Markus Szymik
15:30–16:00 Coffee break
16:00–17:00 Christoph Schweigert
Fri 12 Jun 09:30–10:30 Karin Baur
10:30–11:00 Coffee break
11:00–12:00 Discussion / problem session 		12:00–14:00 Lunch
14:30–15:30 Karin Baur
15:30–16:00 Coffee break
16:00–17:00 Closing discussion
